memberdef.argsstring: (in MR.Vector3b x, in MR.Vector3b y, in MR.Vector3b z)
memberdef.name: fromColumns

briefdescription.para: constructs a matrix from its 3 columns; use this method to get the matrix that transforms basis vectors ( plusX, plusY, plusZ ) into vectors ( x, y, z ) respectively Generated from method MR.Matrix3b.fromColumns.

arbitrary 3x3 matrix Generated from class MR.Matrix3b. This is the by-value version of the struct.
